From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Geographical area

A **National Historic Landmark District** (**NHLD**) is a geographical area that has received recognition from the United States Government that the buildings, landscapes, cultural features and archaeological resources within it are of the highest significance and worthy of preservation.

[![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/a/ac/Boston_Post_Road_Historic_District_plaque.jpg/250px-Boston_Post_Road_Historic_District_plaque.jpg)](/wiki/File:Boston_Post_Road_Historic_District_plaque.jpg)

Boston Post Road Historic District plaque

## Characteristics

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=National_Historic_Landmark_District&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Characteristics")]

The boundaries of an NHLD typically include contributing properties that may themselves be listed distinctly as a [National Historic Landmark](/wiki/National_Historic_Landmark "National Historic Landmark") or on the National Register of Historic Places but may also include non-contributing properties. The [U.S. federal government](/wiki/Federal_government_of_the_United_States "Federal government of the United States") designates historic districts through the [National Park Service](/wiki/National_Park_Service "National Park Service"), a division of the [U.S. Department of the Interior](/wiki/United_States_Department_of_the_Interior "United States Department of the Interior").

Once designated an NHL District, districts often become cultural destinations and generate economic benefits for the communities from history-related tourism.[[1]](#cite_note-1) NHLDs often qualify for preservation grant monies but dramatic or negative change to them can impact their integrity and create cause for concern over the loss of NHLD designation.[[2]](#cite_note-Marshall-2) These threats can come from development or climate change as evidenced most recently with the catastrophic damage to the Lahaina NHLD from wildfires.

One of the largest NHLDs is the island of [Nantucket, Massachusetts](/wiki/Nantucket,_Massachusetts "Nantucket, Massachusetts"), at over 30,000 acres; some are much smaller, including the Cobblestone National Historic Landmark District in [New York state](/wiki/New_York_(state) "New York (state)"), which is under one acre in size.

## Distribution by state

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=National_Historic_Landmark_District&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Distribution by state")]

There are just over 100 National Historic Landmark Districts in the U.S., including:

### Alabama

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=National_Historic_Landmark_District&action=edit&section=3 "Edit section: Alabama")]

* [Tuskegee Airmen National Historic Site](/wiki/Tuskegee_Airmen_National_Historic_Site "Tuskegee Airmen National Historic Site")

### Alaska

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=National_Historic_Landmark_District&action=edit&section=4 "Edit section: Alaska")]

* [Seal Island Historic District](/wiki/Seal_Island_Historic_District "Seal Island Historic District")
* [Skagway Historic District and White Pass](/wiki/Skagway_Historic_District_and_White_Pass "Skagway Historic District and White Pass")

### Arizona

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=National_Historic_Landmark_District&action=edit&section=5 "Edit section: Arizona")]

* [Tombstone Historic District](/wiki/Tombstone_Historic_District "Tombstone Historic District") in [Tombstone, Arizona](/wiki/Tombstone,_Arizona "Tombstone, Arizona")
* [Jerome Historic District](/wiki/Jerome_Historic_District "Jerome Historic District")

### Arkansas

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=National_Historic_Landmark_District&action=edit&section=6 "Edit section: Arkansas")]

* [Bathhouse Row](/wiki/Bathhouse_Row "Bathhouse Row")
* [Fort Smith National Historic Site](/wiki/Fort_Smith_National_Historic_Site "Fort Smith National Historic Site")

### California

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=National_Historic_Landmark_District&action=edit&section=7 "Edit section: California")]

* [Monterey Old Town Historic District](/wiki/Monterey_Old_Town_Historic_District "Monterey Old Town Historic District")
* [Coloma](/wiki/Coloma,_California "Coloma, California") in [El Dorado County, California](/wiki/El_Dorado_County,_California "El Dorado County, California")
* [Columbia Historic District](/wiki/Columbia_State_Historic_Park "Columbia State Historic Park") in [Columbia, California](/wiki/Columbia,_California "Columbia, California")
* [Locke Historic District](/wiki/Locke,_California "Locke, California") in the [Sacramento–San Joaquin River Delta](/wiki/Sacramento%E2%80%93San_Joaquin_River_Delta "Sacramento–San Joaquin River Delta")
* [Mission Santa Inés](/wiki/Mission_Santa_In%C3%A9s "Mission Santa Inés")
* [Old Sacramento State Historic Park](/wiki/Old_Sacramento_State_Historic_Park "Old Sacramento State Historic Park") in [Sacramento, California](/wiki/Sacramento,_California "Sacramento, California")
* [Presidio of San Francisco](/wiki/Presidio_of_San_Francisco "Presidio of San Francisco") in [San Francisco, California](/wiki/San_Francisco,_California "San Francisco, California")
* [San Juan Bautista State Historic Park](/wiki/San_Juan_Bautista_State_Historic_Park "San Juan Bautista State Historic Park") in [San Juan Bautista, California](/wiki/San_Juan_Bautista,_California "San Juan Bautista, California")[[3]](#cite_note-3)

### Colorado

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=National_Historic_Landmark_District&action=edit&section=8 "Edit section: Colorado")]

* [Denver Civic Center](/wiki/Denver_Civic_Center "Denver Civic Center") in [Denver](/wiki/Denver "Denver")[[4]](#cite_note-4)
* [Georgetown-Silver Plume Historic District](/wiki/Georgetown-Silver_Plume_Historic_District "Georgetown-Silver Plume Historic District")
* [Telluride Historic District](/wiki/Telluride_Historic_District "Telluride Historic District")
* [Silverton, Colorado](/wiki/Silverton,_Colorado "Silverton, Colorado")
* [Trujillo Homesteads](/wiki/Trujillo_Homesteads "Trujillo Homesteads")
* [Leadville Historic District](/wiki/Leadville_Historic_District "Leadville Historic District")
* [Cripple Creek Historic District](/wiki/Cripple_Creek_Historic_District "Cripple Creek Historic District")
* [Central City/Black Hawk Historic District](/wiki/Central_City/Black_Hawk_Historic_District "Central City/Black Hawk Historic District")

### Connecticut

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=National_Historic_Landmark_District&action=edit&section=9 "Edit section: Connecticut")]

* [Cheney Brothers Historic District](/wiki/Cheney_Brothers_Historic_District "Cheney Brothers Historic District") in [Manchester, Connecticut](/wiki/Manchester,_Connecticut "Manchester, Connecticut")
* [Litchfield Historic District](/wiki/Litchfield_Historic_District "Litchfield Historic District")

### Delaware

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=National_Historic_Landmark_District&action=edit&section=10 "Edit section: Delaware")]

* [New Castle Historic District](/wiki/New_Castle,_Delaware "New Castle, Delaware")
* [Eleutherian Mills](/wiki/Eleutherian_Mills "Eleutherian Mills")

### Florida

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=National_Historic_Landmark_District&action=edit&section=11 "Edit section: Florida")]

* [Ybor City Historic District](/wiki/Ybor_City_Historic_District "Ybor City Historic District") in [Tampa](/wiki/Tampa "Tampa")
* [St. Augustine Town Plan Historic District](/wiki/St._Augustine_Town_Plan_Historic_District "St. Augustine Town Plan Historic District")
* [Pensacola Naval Air Station Historic District](/wiki/Pensacola_Naval_Air_Station_Historic_District "Pensacola Naval Air Station Historic District") in [Pensacola, Florida](/wiki/Pensacola,_Florida "Pensacola, Florida")[[5]](#cite_note-Florida-5)

### Georgia

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=National_Historic_Landmark_District&action=edit&section=12 "Edit section: Georgia")]

* [Savannah Historic District](/wiki/Savannah_Historic_District_(Savannah,_Georgia) "Savannah Historic District (Savannah, Georgia)") in [Savannah, Georgia](/wiki/Savannah,_Georgia "Savannah, Georgia")
* [Sweet Auburn](/wiki/Sweet_Auburn "Sweet Auburn")

### Hawaii

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=National_Historic_Landmark_District&action=edit&section=13 "Edit section: Hawaii")]

* [Lahaina Historic District](/wiki/Lahaina_Historic_District "Lahaina Historic District") in [Maui](/wiki/Maui "Maui")[[6]](#cite_note-6) Large parts of this district were damaged in the [2023 Hawai'i wildfires](/wiki/2023_Hawaii_wildfires "2023 Hawaii wildfires").

### Idaho

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=National_Historic_Landmark_District&action=edit&section=14 "Edit section: Idaho")]

### Illinois

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=National_Historic_Landmark_District&action=edit&section=15 "Edit section: Illinois")]

### Indiana

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=National_Historic_Landmark_District&action=edit&section=16 "Edit section: Indiana")]

* [Madison Historic District](/wiki/Madison_Historic_District_(Madison,_Indiana) "Madison Historic District (Madison, Indiana)") in [Madison, Indiana](/wiki/Madison,_Indiana "Madison, Indiana")

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=National_Historic_Landmark_District&action=edit&section=17 "Edit section: Iowa")]

### Maine

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=National_Historic_Landmark_District&action=edit&section=21 "Edit section: Maine")]

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=National_Historic_Landmark_District&action=edit&section=22 "Edit section: Maryland")]

* [Chestertown Historic District (Chestertown, Maryland)](/wiki/Chestertown_Historic_District_(Chestertown,_Maryland) "Chestertown Historic District (Chestertown, Maryland)") in [Chestertown, Maryland](/wiki/Chestertown,_Maryland "Chestertown, Maryland")
* [St. Mary's City, Maryland](/wiki/St._Mary%27s_City,_Maryland "St. Mary's City, Maryland")

### Massachusetts

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=National_Historic_Landmark_District&action=edit&section=23 "Edit section: Massachusetts")]

* [Nantucket Historic District](/wiki/Nantucket_Historic_District "Nantucket Historic District")

* [Mackinac Island](/wiki/Mackinac_Island "Mackinac Island")

* [Quincy Mine](/wiki/Quincy_Mine "Quincy Mine")

### New York

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=National_Historic_Landmark_District&action=edit&section=34 "Edit section: New York")]
